title: select view repliy wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE EMPLOYEES (EMPNUM INT PRIMARY KEY, NAME VARCHAR(50), SALARY DECIMAL(10, 2));
CREATE TABLE DEPARTMENTS (DEPTID INT PRIMARY KEY, DEPTNAME VARCHAR(50));
CREATE VIEW EMP_DEPT AS SELECT E.EMPNUM, E.NAME, D.DEPTNAME FROM EMPLOYEES E LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENTS D ON E.EMPNUM = D.DEPTID;
INSERT INTO EMPLOYEES (EMPNUM, NAME, SALARY) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 50000.00);
SELECT EMPNUM FROM EMP_DEPT WHERE NAME = 'Alice' AND DEPTNAME IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT query on view with mismatched EMPNUM
